question.title: ao-kernel scaffold FINAL plan onay — CNS-001..005 konsolide
question.body:
5 tur istisare (CNS-001..005) sonucu konsolide edilmis final scaffold planini onayina sunuyorum. Bu plan dogrudan senin verdictlerinden ve dosya bazli allowlist'inden uretildi. Amac: implementasyona gecmeden once son onay.

## FINAL PLAN OZETI

### Konum
Governed AI orchestration runtime — genel agent framework degil. (CNS-001 R1)

### Kaynak Strateji
Iki fazli kopya: main baseline + loving-pascal PR #76 uplift. Klasor bazli degil, dosya allowlist bazli. (CNS-004 Verdict C, CNS-005 Verdict B)

### Task 1: pyproject.toml
- name=ao-kernel, version=0.1.0, requires-python>=3.11
- Zorunlu dep: YALNIZ jsonschema>=4.23.0 (CNS-002 R6)
- Extras: llm (tenacity>=9.0.0, tiktoken>=0.9.0), dev, otel, pgvector
- CLI: ao-kernel = ao_kernel.cli:main
- Packages: ao_kernel + ao_kernel.* + src + src.* (test patterns exclude)
- Package-data: ao_kernel/defaults/**/*.json

### Task 2: ao_kernel/ Facade (7 dosya)
- __init__.py: version 0.1.0, public exports
- cli.py: argparse subparsers + set_defaults(func=...) (CNS-002 onerisi)
- config.py: workspace_root() -> Path | None (CNS-001 R2 library mode), legacy fallback DeprecationWarning (CNS-002 R9)
- init_cmd.py: .ao/ bootstrap, idempotent
- migrate_cmd.py: plan/rapor/--dry-run/--backup contract (CNS-003 R4)
- doctor_cmd.py: 8 saglik kontrolu (extension manifest discovery dahil)
- errors.py: WorkspaceNotFoundError, WorkspaceCorruptedError, DefaultsNotFoundError

### Task 3: ao_kernel/defaults/ (Bundled JSON)
- policies/ recursive copy (90 JSON, work_intake_fragments dahil)
- schemas/ copy (206 JSON)
- registry/ copy (8 JSON, archives/ haric)
- extensions/ manifest-only katalog (17 extension.manifest.v1.json) (CNS-003 R8)
- Her dizine __init__.py

### Task 4: src/ Allowlist Kopya (39 dosya, iki fazli)

Faz 1 — Main baseline (25 dosya):
  src/__init__.py (deprecation warning eklenir)
  src/shared/__init__.py, logger.py, utils.py
  src/prj_kernel_api/__init__.py, api_guardrails.py, provider_guardrails.py,
    providers_registry.py, providers_registry_schema.py, dotenv_loader.py,
    llm_clients.py, llm_router.py, llm_probe_runner.py
  src/providers/__init__.py
  src/orchestrator/__init__.py, quality_gate.py, decision_quality.py
  src/roadmap/__init__.py, change_proposals.py, compiler.py, evidence.py,
    exec_contracts.py, exec_evidence.py, exec_steps.py, executor.py,
    sanitize.py, step_templates.py

Faz 2 — loving-pascal uplift (14 dosya):
  src/prj_kernel_api/circuit_breaker.py, llm_post_processors.py,
    llm_request_builder.py, llm_response_normalizer.py, llm_retry.py,
    llm_transport.py, prompt_registry.py, rate_limiter.py, tool_calling.py
  src/providers/capability_model.py, response_parser.py,
    structured_output.py, token_counter.py
  src/orchestrator/eval_harness.py

v0.1 DISINDA (backlog):
  tool_gateway.py, secrets/, evidence/, session/, ops/, sdk/,
  utils/, prj_airunner/, prj_github_ops/, prj_planner/,
  prj_release_automation/, benchmark/, learning/, autopilot/,
  modules/, tenant/, src/extensions/

### Dogrulama (15 kontrol)
1. pip install -e .[dev] basarili
2. import ao_kernel -> version 0.1.0
3. from src.shared.utils import load_json -> OK + FutureWarning
4. ao-kernel version -> 0.1.0
5. ao-kernel init -> .ao/ olusur
6. ao-kernel doctor -> OK
7. Wheel contents: test dosyasi yok
8. Bundled JSON: recursive fragments mevcut
9. Extension manifest discovery: 17 manifest erisim
10. Workspace precedence + legacy warning
11. PR #76 smoke: circuit_breaker, llm_transport, eval_harness
12. Bozuk workspace.json -> WorkspaceCorruptedError
13. init idempotency
14. migrate --dry-run rapor
15. Library mode: workspace yokken workspace_root() -> None

### SHA Referanslari
- Main HEAD: 3f071b8
- loving-pascal HEAD: 8f22b20
- ao-kernel HEAD: 0500370

### 10 Revizyon (CNS-001..005)
R1: Governed runtime konumlandirmasi
R2: Library + workspace dual mode
R3: src.* -> ao_kernel._legacy (Faz 2, ertelendi)
R4: Migration plan/rapor/dry-run/backup
R5: Streaming Faz 1'e (ertelendi)
R6: Dependencies sadece jsonschema zorunlu
R7: src test exclude + deprecation warning
R8: defaults/extensions/ manifest-only
R9: Legacy fallback DeprecationWarning
R10: Katman bazli allowlist (39 dosya)

## SORULAR

Q1: Bu final planda eksik veya yanlis bir sey var mi? Allowlist'te olmasi gereken ama olmayan dosya var mi?

Q2: Dogrulama plani (15 kontrol) yeterli mi?

Q3: Bu plani oldugu gibi implement etmemize onay veriyor musun?

Kisa ve net yanit ver. Turkce yanit ver.

options.title: Onay — implement et
options.description: Plan hazir, kucuk notlarla implement edilebilir
